MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stpehen Gould for Sue O'Keeffe (Trustee).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to change of the Lockheed carry value. The Court approved the 20th Account but eliminating fees attributable to Meredith (subject to review of the order).
